# The Seed Banks WE Use to Grow Weed (2026 Update)
Published Sep 06, 2025 | _Last updated Feb 28, 2026_
_by Nebula Haze of GrowWeedEasy.com_
Where is the best place to get cannabis seeds? We recommend these cannabis seed source as of late January 2026…
  * [**ILGM**](https://ilgm.com/?aff=6207) (I Love Growing Marijuana) – California, United States
  * [**MSNL**](https://www.marijuana-seeds.nl/seeds101?utm_source=growweedeasy&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=gwe-msnl-seeds) (Marijuana Seeds Netherlands) – Amsterdam seed bank now ships from US, Canada & UK
  * [**North Atlantic Seed Co.**](https://northatlanticseed.com/ref/63951/) – Maine, United States
  * [**Seed Supreme**](https://seedsupreme.com#grower) – Florida, United States
  * [**Seedsman**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – Ships from US & Europe
  * **Other** – Did we miss anyone you like? [Let us know](https://www.growweedeasy.com/website-feedback).

Check out my [recent grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress) featuring seeds from [Seedsman](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), [NASC](https://northatlanticseed.com/ref/63951/) & [Seed Supreme](https://seedsupreme.com#grower).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/cannabis-seeds-on-a-white-background.jpg)
Seeds of different strains grow different buds.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/buds-in-jars-after-harvest-its-weed-time.jpg)
Are you looking for **yields** (like [Blue Dream](https://seedsupreme.com/blue-dream-feminized.html#grower)) or **beauty** (like [Candy Games #38](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/candy-games-38-feminized-seeds-havg-cg38-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64))?
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/blue-dream-and-candy-games-38-green-purple-cannabis-plants-harvest-sm.jpg)
Maybe **density & potency **are most important. Then go with a strain like [Purple Ghost Candy](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-ghost-candy-feminized-seeds-sman-pgcandy-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/purple-ghost-candy-cannabis-plants-harvest-growweedeasy.jpg)
Note: [Purple Ghost Candy](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-ghost-candy-feminized-seeds-sman-pgcandy-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) is an oversized stretchy plant that always makes potent, dense buds, but _not_ always purple. See the [full strain review](https://www.growweedeasy.com/home-grow-strain-review-purple-ghost-candy-by-seedsman).
Or perhaps the key to _your_ heart is a pungent, memorable smell (like [Mandarin Cookies V2](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/mandarin-cookies-v2-feminized-seeds-etho-macov2-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/mandarin-cookies-bud-closeup.jpg)
Check out the [new cannabis strain library](https://www.growweedeasy.com/strain-library) for reviews of strains GrowWeedEasy.com recommends for home growers.
Note: Here’s how to [store your seeds](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-store-cannabis-seeds-so-they-last-forever) so they last for years.
Where to get cannabis seeds? Here’s our note to marijuana growers looking for good seeds going into a turbulent 2026…
* * *
## Updates on the 2026 Farm Bill
“How will the new Farm bill for 2026 affect home growers? Is there a specific deadline for growers? I have seen many opinions, but have yet to find a straightforward answer to this question.” ~ Bob
Laws and regulations seem to be evolving every day. The reason no one can give you a straight answer is because no one knows for sure what will happen.
If you want my personal opinion, I suspect it will have a small effect in the short term, and a long term dampening effect.
Seed companies may try to work with lawmakers to find ways to ship seeds in compliance with the law. But unless the law is changed, fewer small breeders will participate. Some people are concerned that only the biggest companies with deep pockets for a legal team might be able to easily sell seeds and take payments.
That’s why home growers need to value cannabis genetics.
In other words, don’t panic. However, do take on a general preparedness mindset.
Happy growing,  
_Nebula Haze_
GrowWeedEasy.com
* * *
Hey growers,
Looking for good cannabis genetics? We got you! We have run our recommended cannabis [seed source page](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds) on GrowWeedEasy.com since we started the website in 2010.
GrowWeedEasy.com’s trusted seed sources list has helped home growers find seeds since 2010.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds)
If you don’t have cannabis seeds in hand, it can feel like it’s going to be hard to get them. Luckily, these days, you can get viable seeds of good strains sent to you almost anywhere. Today, we want to hear about _your_ experiences ordering seeds online.
Marijuana seeds are so tiny…
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/marijuana-seeds-in-hand-so-tiny-growweedeasy-com-best-seeds-reviews-survey.jpg)
But within each seed is a tiny living thing, longing to be released…
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/cannabis-seeds-in-hand-closeup-growweedeasy-best-seed-review-survey-sm.jpg)
_Did you know?_ A cannabis seedling embryo is already fully-formed inside each seed, just waiting to germinate and grow weed for you!
Germination lets the seedling inside escape its shell prison!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/cannabis-seeds-have-leaves-roots-embryo-fully-formed-inside-shell.jpg)
Never touch newly germinated seedlings like this, I only did it for the picture!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/seedling-fully-formed-embryo-inside-cannabis-seed-grow-weed-easy-com-best-seed-bank-survey.jpg)
Leaves are yellow inside the shell, and turn green once the leaves start getting exposed to light.
Less than a day after being planted into a Rapid Rooter, the seedling is green and already growing new leaves!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/cannabis-seedling-in-rapid-rooter-growweedeasy-hydro-dwc-setup-sm.jpg)
[Learn how to germinate seeds here](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-germinate-seeds-via-paper-towel-method).
Back in 2010 when we started GWE, we’d only had good experiences with a single seedbank so far (the others had been mediocre-to-bad). So back then, the seed source list had only _one_ option…
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2010-growweedeasy-come-screenshot-from-wayback-machine-with-original-banner-added.jpg)
_Bonus:_ Check out the [October 2010 version](https://web.archive.org/web/20101005062459/http://growweedeasy.com/where-can-i-safely-buy-marijuana-seeds-online) of the seeds page on the Wayback Machine! You can even click around to see the original version of the site 🙂
Our seeds page is not meant to be a comprehensive list of seed sources. Sirius and I are just a two-person team and can’t try every seed company. There are many, many**outstanding cannabis seed sources _not_ listed** on our seeds page.
But what the page _is,_ is the list of the seed banks we **actually use ourselves to grow weed** at home and document on the website.
Check out our recent [autoflowering grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-auto-flowering-cannabis-grow-journal)! The [OG Kush Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/original-og-kush-auto-feminised-seeds-fb-ogk-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) produced smooth, potent buds.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/og-kush-auto-cannabis-cola-just-before-harvest-nebula-haze-growweedeasy.jpg)
When we stop using a seed company ourselves, for whatever reason, we take it off the seed source page. Usually, they haven’t done anything _wrong_ , just simply no longer carry strains we’re looking to grow with.
We believe it’s crucial to ensure every seed bank on the list is legit, and only stay if we continue to use it for our home grows.
**Our seed bank testing is led by you:** If we hear about a really great new company that everyone loves, we will test it out ourselves. Our goal isn’t _just_ to grow great weed (though we do a lot of that too!), but also help home growers find exactly what they’re looking for.
**GrowWeedEasy.com testing process for seed banks**
  * **Community feedback** – If we keep hearing good things about a particular seed source, we know it’s time to give it a try.
  * **Order seeds anonymously** – We never tell them it’s us. I always order the seeds myself as if I were a regular customer. I feel like that’s way more likely to give the “authentic” experience.
  * **Grow the seeds** – Next, we actually grow the seeds from germination to harvest in a home grow environment.
  * **Document the results** – We take pictures and notes about each plant, including where we got the seeds, and share that information on [GrowWeedEasy.com](http://growweedeasy.com) and through our newsletter.
  * **Lab testing** – When funding is available, we get the buds lab-tested, especially for[ side-by-side grow experiments](https://www.growweedeasy.com/side-by-side-cannabis-grow-journal-experiments-by-nebula-haze) with clones (like testing [super soil vs coco](https://www.growweedeasy.com/super-soil-vs-coco-coir-side-by-side-cannabis-grow-journal) or plant training methods like [defoliation vs natural](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-cannabis-defoliation-experiment-side-by-side-grow-journal))

We also love, _love_ , LOVE when you send us grow pictures, or tell about your experience with seed banks and their strains/seeds.
Our current cannabis seed source recommendations, as of January 2026.
  * [**ILGM**](https://ilgm.com/?aff=6207) (I Love Growing Marijuana) – California, United States
  * [**MSNL**](https://www.marijuana-seeds.nl/seeds101?utm_source=growweedeasy&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=gwe-msnl-seeds) (Marijuana Seeds Netherlands) – Amsterdam seed bank with shipping centers in the US, Canada, and UK.
  * [**North Atlantic Seed Co.**](https://northatlanticseed.com/ref/63951/) – Maine, United States
  * [**Seed Supreme**](https://seedsupreme.com#grower) – Florida, United States
  * [**Seedsman**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – Ships from US & Europe
  * **Other** – Did we miss anyone you like?

We encourage you to[ write us any time](https://www.growweedeasy.com/website-feedback) with specific cannabis seed bank feedback, including anecdotes, or just your overall thoughts or experiences buying cannabis seeds online where you live.
We’ll be considering everyone’s feedback as we go through 2026. And make sure to [sign up to our newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news) to ensure you get insider information and updates about seed sources that we can’t post on the website. You can email GrowWeedEasy.com directly by responding to our weekly newsletter.
* * *
Harvest great smelling, dense, **potent** buds with proven home harvest techniques. By Nebula Haze & Sirius Fourside, authors of GrowWeedEasy.com.

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
